commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The PR needs contributor proof and maintainer security acceptance after the code defect is fixed, so it should stay in human review rather than cleanup closure.; Needs attention: The patch adds an opt-in plaintext gateway bearer clipboard path, which needs maintainer-approved boundaries and proof that the bearer never reaches logs or URLs.; Review finding: [P1] Stop overwriting the copied token — src/commands... (sha=972598932faca53cf6354dc2b3f7bbce09f0d9cf)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an `openclaw dashboard --print-token` option that attempts to copy the resolved SecretRef-managed gateway token to the clipboard for Control UI login.

PR surface: Source +15. Total +15 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current `origin/main` and v2026.6.8 keep SecretRef-managed dashboard URLs non-tokenized, and the PR branch is source-reproducible as still broken because the later dashboard URL clipboard write overwrites the token copy.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor proof and maintainer security acceptance after the code defect is fixed, so it should stay in human review rather than cleanup closure.

target.title: fix(dashboard): add --print-token to copy SecretRef-managed gateway token to clipboard (fixes #93043)
